Source: OpenAI Node SDK Releases
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-node/releases
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# OpenAI Node SDK Releases

## v6.32.0 (March 17, 2026)
- Added 5.4 nano and mini model slugs

## v6.31.0 (March 16, 2026)
- Introduced in/nin filter types to ComparisonFilter

## v6.30.1 (March 16, 2026)
- Internal CI branch adjustments

## v6.30.0 (March 16, 2026)
- Added /v1/videos endpoint support for batches
- Introduced defer_loading field to NamespaceTool
- Fixed OIDC publishing for npm

## v6.29.0 (March 13, 2026)
- Added custom voices functionality

## v6.28.0 (March 13, 2026)
- Sora API improvements: character API, video editing, higher resolution exports
- Removed detail field from ResponseInputFile types
- Updated dependencies for security vulnerabilities

## v6.27.0 (March 5, 2026)
- Moved ComputerTool to general availability

## v6.26.0 (March 5, 2026)
- Released GPT-5.4 model support
- Added tool search functionality and new computer tool capabilities

## v6.25.0 (February 24, 2026)
- Added phase field with documentation refinements

## v6.24.0 (February 24, 2026)
- Introduced gpt-realtime-1.5 and gpt-audio-1.5 models
